title: Welder Fabricator
description: A Welder Fabricator in India works on-site or in a workshop, fabricating and repairing metal structures, machinery, and equipment using various welding techniques. They follow blueprints, work with different materials, and ensure quality control. Their day involves manual labor, problem-solving, and teamwork, often in a fast-paced environment with varying temperatures and noise levels.
top_govt_colleges: Directorate General of Employment and Training (DGET)
top_private_colleges: Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology

career_progression.year_0_2: Apprenticeship, basic training, and on-the-job experience
career_progression.year_3_5: Specialization in a specific welding technique, quality control, and leadership roles
career_progression.year_6_10: Supervisory positions, project management, and entrepreneurship
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Starting a welding and fabrication services company or a manufacturing unit
career_progression.global_pathway: Opportunities in the Middle East, Africa, and Southeast Asia for skilled welders and fabricators

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Challenging work environment, long hours, and physical demands
